deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ "${APP_ROLE:-dashboard}" = "rag" ]; then uvicorn rag_service.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000} --workers ${UVICORN_WORKERS:-2}; else gunicorn -w ${GUNICORN_WORKERS:-4} -k sync -b 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-5000} --timeout 300 --keep-alive 5 --graceful-timeout 300 app_production:app; fi'
